title: Entity Dragonflaming Behavior
description: Allows this entity to use a flame-breath attack.

cooldown_time.title: Cooldown Time
cooldown_time.description: Time (in seconds) between each start of the cycle to roar, then breath flame.

flame_time.title: Flame Time
flame_time.description: Time (in seconds), after roar, to breath flame.

ground_flame_count.title: Ground Flame Count
ground_flame_count.description: Number of ground flame-breath attacks to use before flight-takeoff.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• ender_dragon: 1

roar_time.title: Roar Time
roar_time.description: Time (in seconds) to roar, before breathing flame.
